title: Loud (Part 2)
speaker: Antwan Cronje
summary: The enemy, like a spam caller, doesn't need to shout; he just needs you to doubt, because the voices in our minds are after our identity. Our identity is the operating system for our life, and if the enemy can get us to believe lies about who we are, our entire life comes crumbling down.
quotes: Whatever voice is speaking the loudest in your life right now is the one that's running the show.
Your identity is the operating system of your life.
The enemy does not need to shout. He just needs you to doubt.
